# Fixture: p2_no_hallucinated_phone_number
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 27.0s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Markeisha! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I can't sign into my account
Concierge: Tap Forgot Password on the login screen — that'll send you a reset link to get back in.
Partner: I tried that and it's not working. No one is responding to my emails either. Do you have a phone number I can call?

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
There's no phone support available, but email support@shiftsmart.com is your best option. Check your spam folder first though — their responses sometimes filter there.
